conversation_summary.title: KnowledgeForge historical ingestion tooling and KFreport correction
conversation_summary.summary: Built and verified safe KnowledgeForge tooling for historical-session inventory, bounded extraction prompt batches, and Codex SQLite export, then corrected the objective to atomic memory-card ingestion rather than full transcript ingestion.
key_takeaways: Historical AI sessions should produce durable atomic KnowledgeForge memory cards, not raw transcript truth.
The local Windows CLI can import extraction JSON through `knowledgeforge memory import-json` when `PYTHONPATH=src` is set.
The new `knowledgeforge historical` CLI group provides inventory, batch prompt generation, and Codex SQLite export surfaces.

memory_cards.title: Historical ingestion should create atomic cards, not full conversation truth
memory_cards.body: The user explicitly wants KnowledgeForge historical-session ingestion to extract compact durable memory cards rather than ingesting full raw conversations as current truth.
memory_cards.why: This prevents old transcript noise from poisoning retrieval while preserving reusable decisions, constraints, fixes, TODOs, schemas, commands, and environment facts.

source.conversation_title: KnowledgeForge historical ingestion tooling and KFreport correction

memory_cards.title: Historical memory ingestion must exclude secrets and credential-bearing logs
memory_cards.body: Never store secrets, tokens, passwords, private keys, cookies, phone numbers, full env files, or raw credential-bearing logs in KnowledgeForge memory cards.
memory_cards.why: Historical archives can contain sensitive material; ingestion must stop or skip noisy/leaky material rather than preserving secrets in retrieval.

source.conversation_title: KnowledgeForge historical ingestion tooling and KFreport correction

memory_cards.title: Historical cards default to non-current truth unless verified
memory_cards.body: Historical or inferred information should not be marked current truth unless current repo state, test output, or explicit user confirmation proves it. Otherwise use current_truth=false and usually needs_repo_confirmation=true.
memory_cards.why: This keeps old or inferred session knowledge useful for orientation without making it implementation authority.

source.conversation_title: KnowledgeForge historical ingestion tooling and KFreport correction

memory_cards.title: Historical ingestion tooling CLI was added and verified
memory_cards.body: The repo now has a `knowledgeforge historical` CLI group with `inventory`, `batch-prompts`, and `codex-sqlite-export` commands, plus tests for source inventory, prompt batching, Codex SQLite export, and existing ingest queue behavior.
memory_cards.why: These tools provide the safer operator path needed before historical-session pilot extraction and adapter expansion.

source.conversation_title: KnowledgeForge historical ingestion tooling and KFreport correction

memory_cards.title: Pilot atomic extraction before full historical ingestion
memory_cards.body: Next ingestion step is to run a reviewed pilot that extracts durable cards from a small session batch, audits the cards for leakage/noise/status correctness, then expands in checkpoints. Unsupported Windsurf, Antigravity, and Kimi stores need adapters before their durable facts can be extracted.
memory_cards.why: The user wants historical data, but only as useful atomic memory cards with audit gates and no secret leakage.

source.conversation_title: KnowledgeForge historical ingestion tooling and KFreport correction

memory_cards.title: Windows session needs PYTHONPATH=src for local KnowledgeForge CLI
memory_cards.body: In the Windows Codex workspace, `python -m knowledgeforge.interfaces.cli` resolves the intended local clone when `PYTHONPATH=src` is set; without it, Python resolved an older `rag_obsidian_ai\knowledgeforge` checkout earlier in the session.
memory_cards.why: Using the wrong import path can make CLI commands fail or operate against stale code/config while working on KnowledgeForge.

source.conversation_title: KnowledgeForge historical ingestion tooling and KFreport correction

discarded_noise.reason: Long inventory listings and test output were not stored as cards.
Only the reusable import-path fact was preserved.
